channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PRAKASHSTL] Prakash Steelage Receives Show Cause Notice from SEBI
item.description:
Prakash Steelage Ltd has received a show cause notice from SEBI on April 22, 2026, regarding alleged violations of LODR Regulations. The notice, dated April 21, 2026, was issued under Rule 4(1) of the SEBI (Procedure for Holding Inquiry and Imposing Penalties) Rules, 1995. The company is preparing its response and will submit it within the permitted timelines. This follows an ongoing SEBI investigation, which was previously intimated to the exchanges on March 28, 2024.

  • Prakash Steelage received a show cause notice from SEBI on April 22, 2026.
  • The notice pertains to alleged violations of LODR Regulations.
  • The company is preparing its response to the show cause notice.
  • This follows an ongoing SEBI investigation initiated earlier.
  • The company will furnish its response within the stipulated timelines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRAKASH STEELAGE LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [LYKISLTD] Lykis Ltd Appoints Two Independent Directors
item.description:
Lykis Ltd's Board of Directors, at their meeting on April 22, 2026, approved the appointment of Ms. Radhika Agrawal (DIN: 11663283) and Ms. Kinjal Gandhi (DIN: 09376071) as Additional Non-Executive Independent Directors. These appointments are for a term of five years and are subject to the approval of shareholders at the ensuing Annual General Meeting. Ms. Agrawal is a qualified Company Secretary with nearly 9 years of experience in corporate law and compliance. Ms. Gandhi is a seasoned banking and finance professional with over a decade of experience in client relationship management and wealth advisory. Both appointees are unrelated to existing directors and are not debarred by SEBI.

  • Lykis Ltd appointed two new independent directors.
  • Ms. Radhika Agrawal brings corporate law and compliance expertise.
  • Ms. Kinjal Gandhi offers extensive banking and finance experience.
  • Appointments are for five years, pending shareholder approval.
  • Enhances board diversity and governance structure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lykis Limited | Category: Management Change

item.title: [STUDDS] Studds Accessories to Incorporate Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Italy
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Studds Accessories Ltd's Board of Directors approved the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) in Italy, Europe, with a capital of up to EUR 1,000,000. This decision replaces the previously approved plan to establish a WOS in Spain. The subsidiary will focus on importation, distribution, marketing, and sales of Studds' products in Europe, aiming to strengthen the company's presence and support its global growth strategy. The incorporation is subject to regulatory approvals.

  • Studds Accessories will incorporate a Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Italy with EUR 1,000,000 capital.
  • The subsidiary will handle importation, distribution, and sales in Europe.
  • This move replaces the prior plan to incorporate a subsidiary in Spain.
  • The WOS aims to strengthen Studds' European presence and global growth.
  • The incorporation is subject to approvals from relevant statutory authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Studds Accessories Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [PREVEST] Prevest Denpro Appoints Two New Independent Directors
item.description:
Prevest Denpro Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Piyush Kiranprakash Gupta and Mr. Abhijeet Sadashiv Haridas as Additional Directors, serving as Non-Executive Independent Directors. The Board of Directors approved these appointments via a circular resolution on April 22, 2026. Both directors are appointed for a term of five years, effective from April 22, 2026, and are not liable to retire by rotation. Mr. Gupta is a specialist in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, an Assistant Professor, and a practicing Micro-Endodontist. Mr. Haridas also holds an MDS in Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics and has experience as an Associate Dentist and in academics. The company confirmed that neither appointee is related to any existing directors, key managerial personnel, or promoters, and neither is debarred from holding a directorship by any regulatory authority.

  • Prevest Denpro appointed two new Non-Executive Independent Directors.
  • Mr. Piyush Kiranprakash Gupta and Mr. Abhijeet Sadashiv Haridas join the board.
  • Both directors are appointed for a five-year term from April 22, 2026.
  • The appointments enhance board independence and expertise.
  • New directors are not related to existing management or promoters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prevest Denpro Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RKFORGE] Ramkrishna Forgings: May 8, 2026 record date for 1st interim dividend
item.description:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 01, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. During this meeting, the Board will also consider declaring the 1st interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26. If the dividend is declared, May 08, 2026, has been designated as the record date to ascertain the eligibility of shareholders for the payment. The trading window for designated persons remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results.

  • Board meeting on May 1, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 financial results.
  • Board to consider declaring 1st interim dividend for FY2025-26.
  • May 8, 2026, set as record date for the interim dividend, if declared.
  • Trading window remains closed for designated persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMKRISHNA FORGINGS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KIRLPNU] Kirloskar Pneumatic Board to Consider Equity Share Split on April 27, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kirloskar Pneumatic Company Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 27, 2026. During this meeting, the board will specifically consider and approve the sub-division of the company's equity shares, which currently have a face value of Rs. 2/- each. The trading window for the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until April 29, 2026, in adherence to insider trading regulations. This corporate action could potentially enhance share liquidity and accessibility for investors.

  • Board meeting on April 27, 2026, to consider equity share sub-division.
  • Current equity shares have a face value of Rs. 2/- each.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to April 29, 2026.
  • Potential stock split could increase share liquidity and accessibility.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIRLOSKAR PNEUMATIC CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZFCVINDIA] ZF India Reopens Special Window for Physical Share Relodgement
item.description:
ZF Commercial Vehicle Control Systems India Ltd has announced the reopening of a special window for the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares. This initiative follows SEBI's circular and allows investors who submitted transfer requests before April 1, 2019, but were returned due to deficiencies, to re-lodge their requests. The window is open from February 5, 2026, to February 4, 2027, facilitating both transfer and dematerialization of physical securities purchased before April 1, 2019.

  • ZF India reopens special window for physical share transfer relodgement.
  • Window open from February 5, 2026, to February 4, 2027.
  • Opportunity for investors with previously rejected transfer requests.
  • Facilitates transfer and dematerialization of physical securities.
  • SEBI circular supports this initiative for investor convenience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZF Commercial Vehicle Control Systems India Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [EPL] EPL Issues ₹60 Cr in Commercial Papers
item.description:
EPL Ltd has issued and allotted Commercial Papers amounting to ₹60 Crore on April 22, 2026. The Commercial Papers have a face value of ₹5,00,000 per unit, a discount rate of 6.64% p.a., and a yield rate of 6.75% p.a. The maturity date for these Commercial Papers is July 21, 2026. The company is in the process of listing these Commercial Papers with the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

  • EPL Ltd issued Commercial Papers totaling ₹60 Crore on April 22, 2026.
  • The Commercial Papers have a face value of ₹5,00,000 per unit.
  • The discount and yield rates are 6.64% p.a. and 6.75% p.a., respectively.
  • The maturity date for the Commercial Papers is July 21, 2026.
  • EPL is listing the Commercial Papers on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPL Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [EVEREADY] Eveready Commissions ₹200 Cr Alkaline Battery Plant in Jammu
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Eveready Industries India Ltd has commissioned India’s only operating alkaline battery facility in Jammu, with an investment of approximately ₹200 crore. The facility has an annual installed production capacity of 456 million batteries. This initiative aims to strengthen domestic manufacturing, reduce import dependence, and support the 'Make in India' vision. The plant is expected to generate over 500 direct and indirect jobs in the Jammu region.

  • Eveready invests ₹200 crore in a new alkaline battery facility in Jammu.
  • The plant has an annual installed capacity of 456 million alkaline batteries.
  • The facility aims to reduce India's import dependence and boost domestic manufacturing.
  • The project is expected to generate over 500 direct and indirect jobs.
  • Eveready aims to expand business through white labeling and serve international markets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EVEREADY INDUSTRIES INDIA LTD. | Category: Expansion

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC: 2 Independent Directors Cease Upon Tenure Completion
item.description:
NBCC (India) Ltd announced that two Independent Directors, Shri Bhimrao Panda Bhosale (DIN: 09422731) and Shri Deepak Singh (DIN: 08568480), have ceased to be part of the Board of Directors. This cessation occurred on April 22, 2026, upon the completion of their respective tenures. The company clarified that there is no other reason for their departure. This information is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation 2015 and follows a previous intimation dated April 23, 2025.

  • Two Independent Directors completed their tenure.
  • Shri Bhimrao Panda Bhosale and Shri Deepak Singh ceased from the Board.
  • Cessation effective April 22, 2026, due to tenure completion.
  • No other reasons cited for their departure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: Management Change
